name: kanbanmate
description: Reusable Kanban orchestrator on GitHub Projects v2 — autonomous Claude Code agents in tmux + git-worktree workspaces, driven by a single polling daemon.

plugins.name: kanban
plugins.description: Kanban orchestrator CLI — the /kanban skill is a thin wrapper that shells out to the kanban CLI for all operations (install, init, seed, status, sessions, cancel, logs, doctor, run, poll).
